overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains an active and specialized presence across Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, engaging a total audience of 3,580 followers. His social media activity consistently highlights academic research, new publications, methodological advancements in computational social science, and professional opportunities. While LinkedIn commands the largest follower base and significant absolute interactions, Bluesky stands out with the highest engagement rate per post, indicating a particularly receptive and interactive audience on that platform. The content effectively communicates his expertise and academic contributions.

contentThemes.description: Sharing new research papers, algorithm releases (e.g., CooRnet), and findings related to disinformation and coordinated behavior on social media.
Announcing grant awards, postdoctoral researcher positions, and PhD student opportunities in computational social science.
Discussing methodological approaches, participating in academic discussions, and anticipating presentations at relevant conferences.

recommendations: Leverage Bluesky's high engagement rate by consistently posting research highlights and interactive content tailored for that audience to further grow its impact.
Continue to utilize LinkedIn for major professional announcements like grant awards and hiring calls, as it reaches the largest and most relevant professional audience.
Explore repurposing highly engaging content (e.g., paper announcements, job calls) with platform-specific adaptations across all platforms to maximize reach and engagement.
Consider incorporating more direct calls-to-action or questions in Mastodon posts to encourage higher interaction, similar to Bluesky's performance.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky exhibits the highest engagement rate per post, suggesting a highly active and receptive audience. Content related to new publications and research opportunities performs exceptionally well here.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon serves as a solid platform for academic updates and discussions regarding research methodologies. While it has the smallest follower count among the three, it maintains a consistent level of engagement within its community.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn is the primary platform for reaching a broad professional audience, boasting the highest follower count. It is exceptionally effective for formal announcements such as grant awards and job openings, generating significant absolute interactions.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
